_meta.description: Australia payer seed data: Medicare (ECLIPSE) + major private health insurers (Phase 40 Superseding)
_meta.source: Australian Prudential Regulation Authority (APRA) Private Health Insurer list + Services Australia Medicare
_meta.notes: Medicare is the universal public insurer. Private health insurers are regulated by APRA. Claims routed via ECLIPSE gateway for Medicare. Private insurers use individual portals/APIs.

payers.name: Medicare Australia (Services Australia)
payers.enrollmentNotes: All providers must register with Services Australia. Claims via ECLIPSE (Electronic Claim Lodgement and Information Processing Service Environment). HPOS (Health Professional Online Services) for provider registration.

endpoints.notes: ECLIPSE gateway for Medicare claiming. Requires PRODA (Provider Digital Access) authentication.
Medicare Patient Verification (via ECLIPSE DVA/Medicare Online)

payers.name: Department of Veterans' Affairs (DVA) Australia
payers.enrollmentNotes: DVA Gold/White card holders. Claims via ECLIPSE gateway (same as Medicare).

payers.name: Medibank Private Limited
payers.enrollmentNotes: Largest AU private insurer. Provider enrollment via Medibank provider portal. ECLIPSE/HICAPS for in-practice claiming.

payers.name: Bupa Health Insurance Australia
payers.enrollmentNotes: Second largest AU private insurer. Provider enrollment via Bupa provider portal. HICAPS terminal for in-practice.

payers.name: HCF (Hospitals Contribution Fund of Australia)
payers.enrollmentNotes: Not-for-profit fund. Provider enrollment via HICAPS/ECLIPSE.

payers.name: nib Health Funds Limited
payers.enrollmentNotes: Major AU insurer. Provider enrollment via nib provider portal.

payers.name: APRA Private Health Insurer Roster (Importer Placeholder)
payers.enrollmentNotes: Placeholder for bulk import of all APRA-regulated private health insurers. Source: APRA PHI statistics quarterly publication. Use CSV importer with APRA data extract.
